        Returns:

        Gets the serviceidGroups. Boolean to include serviceid group consumption.
        Returns:
        the serviceidGroups

      • serviceidsPerGroup

        public java.lang.String serviceidsPerGroup()
        Gets the serviceidsPerGroup. Comma seperated list of ServiceID groups to include for consumption.
        Returns:
        the serviceidsPerGroup

      • profiles

        public java.lang.String profiles()
        Gets the profiles. Boolean to include trusted profiles consumption.
        Returns:
        the profiles

      • apikeysPerIdentity

        public java.lang.String apikeysPerIdentity()
        Gets the apikeysPerIdentity. Comma seperated list of IAM IDs to include for API key consumption.
        Returns:
        the apikeysPerIdentity

      • templates

        public java.lang.String templates()
        Gets the templates. Boolean to include template consumption.
        Returns:
        the templates

      • templateVersionsPerTemplate

        public java.lang.String templateVersionsPerTemplate()
        Gets the templateVersionsPerTemplate. Comma seperated list of template IDs to include for template version consumption.
        Returns:
        the templateVersionsPerTemplate

      • idps

        public java.lang.String idps()
        Gets the idps. Boolean to include identity provider consumption.
        Returns:
        the idps

      • claimRulesPerGroup

        public java.lang.String claimRulesPerGroup()
        Gets the claimRulesPerGroup. Comma seperated list of access groups to include for claim rules consumption.
        Returns:
        the claimRulesPerGroup

      • claimRulesPerProfile

        public java.lang.String claimRulesPerProfile()
        Gets the claimRulesPerProfile. Comma seperated list of profiles to include for claim rules consumption.
        Returns:
        the claimRulesPerProfile

      • crLinks

        public java.lang.String crLinks()
        Gets the crLinks. Boolean to include compute resource links consumption.
        Returns:
        the crLinks

      • crLinksPerProfile

        public java.lang.String crLinksPerProfile()
        Gets the crLinksPerProfile. Comma seperated list of profile IDs to include for cr links consumption.
        Returns:
        the crLinksPerProfile

        public java.lang.String crRules()
        Gets the crRules. Boolean to include compute resource rules consumption.
        Returns:
        the crRules
